task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the 'Restricted Sales' profile.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a profile named 'Restricted Sales' in the CRM Profiles list or within a profile creation/edit screen.

task_completion.description: Verify the profile description matches the task instructions.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the exact text 'Sales profile without delete privileges for core records' in the description field of the 'Restricted Sales' profile.

task_completion.description: Verify the correct permissions are set for the 'Leads' module.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the privileges grid for the 'Restricted Sales' profile, locate the 'Leads' row. The 'Delete' checkbox must be unchecked, while the 'Create', 'Edit', and 'View' checkboxes must be checked.

task_completion.description: Verify the correct permissions are set for the 'Contacts' module.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the privileges grid for the 'Restricted Sales' profile, locate the 'Contacts' row. The 'Delete' checkbox must be unchecked, while the 'Create', 'Edit', and 'View' checkboxes must be checked.

task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the 'Junior Sales Rep' role.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a role named 'Junior Sales Rep' in the CRM Roles list, role creation screen, or role hierarchy tree.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'Junior Sales Rep' role reports to the 'Sales Manager'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the role hierarchy tree or the role details screen to confirm that 'Junior Sales Rep' is placed directly under or explicitly reports to 'Sales Manager'.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'Restricted Sales' profile is assigned to the 'Junior Sales Rep' role.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the role details or creation screen for 'Junior Sales Rep', look for 'Restricted Sales' selected in the profile assignment section (e.g., 'Assign Privileges from Profile').

integrity.description: Ensure the agent used the CRM web interface to configure the settings.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Vtiger CRM web interface in a browser, not terminal commands, database queries, or API scripts.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent did not just type the expected answers into a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: The text 'Restricted Sales' and 'Junior Sales Rep' should appear within the actual CRM input fields or data tables, not in a notepad or text editor application.

integrity.description: Ensure the configuration was actually saved and applied in the CRM.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for success/save confirmation toasts, or the presence of the newly created profile and role in their respective summary lists or hierarchy trees, rather than just unsaved text in input forms.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected profile name is exactly 'Restricted Sales'. The expected role name is exactly 'Junior Sales Rep'. The expected parent role for the new role is 'Sales Manager', which is a default role in the Vtiger CRM system.
